checks.name: roster_presence_vs_serebii
checks.summary: 186/186 base Champions Pokemon match Serebii exactly (set diff empty both directions)

checks.name: mega_evolution_linkage
checks.summary: 58 Champions bases linked to megas; all point to live rows (no broken links). 36 classic + 23 new Champions megas.

checks.name: roster_basic_sanity
checks.summary: 0 empty movepools / abilities / types. 0 suspicious base stats. 18/18 types represented. Avg movepool 62.2 moves, avg abilities 2.53.

checks.name: vgc_staples_present
checks.summary: 12/12 competitive staple items present in shop: Assault Vest, Choice Band/Specs, Life Orb, Leftovers, Sitrus Berry, Focus Sash, Clear Amulet, Covert Cloak, Safety Goggles, Rocky Helmet, Weakness Policy

checks.name: items_categorization
checks.summary: 0 miscategorized berries. Categories: 58 mega_stone + 51 held + 28 berry = 137 shop items total

checks.name: moves_basic_sanity
checks.summary: 494 Champions-available moves. 0 null types/categories. 0 moves with power > 250.

checks.name: referential_integrity
checks.summary: 0 dangling user_pokemon refs. 0 dangling item refs. 0 dangling mega links. 0 dangling avatars.

checks.name: usage_data_referential
checks.summary: 0 orphan move references in pokemon_usage. 0 orphan item references. All names match canonical tables.

discrepancies_fixed.root_cause: serebii_static.py current_category state leaks across sections when h2 header detection fails
discrepancies_fixed.data_fix: UPDATE items SET category='berry' WHERE name ILIKE '%berry%' AND category='mega_stone'
discrepancies_fixed.code_fix: Made item_category a local variable in scrape_items so name-based heuristic no longer mutates shared state

discrepancies_fixed.issue: 21 Champions-staple held items missing from items table
discrepancies_fixed.root_cause: seed_champions.py HELD_ITEMS list was extended after initial seed; subsequent serebii_static ingest overwrote without preserving
discrepancies_fixed.data_fix: Inserted Assault Vest, Choice Band, Choice Specs, Clear Amulet, Covert Cloak, Eject Button/Pack, Expert Belt, Grassy Seed, Iron Ball, Life Orb, Light Clay, Loaded Dice, Protective Pads, Rocky Helmet, Room Service, Safety Goggles, Terrain Extender, Throat Spray, Weakness Policy, Wide Lens (IDs 30001-30021)

discrepancies_fixed.issue: 2 held items incorrectly archived (King's Rock, Quick Claw)
discrepancies_fixed.root_cause: Session D prune archived them because champions_shop_available was false; they should have been flagged true per Serebii
discrepancies_fixed.data_fix: Restored from items_archive to live items with champions_shop_available=true

discrepancies_fixed.issue: 9 mega stones archived despite their Mega Pokemon being Champions-linked
discrepancies_fixed.root_cause: champions_shop_available=false on archive-time; but Mega Aggron/Beedrill/Chesnaught/Delphox/Greninja/Gyarados/Heracross/Manectric/Steelix are all live in the pokemon table as mega_evolution_id targets
discrepancies_fixed.data_fix: Restored Aggronite, Beedrillite, Chesnaughtite, Delphoxite, Greninjite, Gyaradosite, Heracronite, Manectite, Steelixite

known_display_quirks_not_fixed.issue: 11 Pokemon names include form suffixes that differ from common community usage
known_display_quirks_not_fixed.rationale: These are PokeAPI canonical form slugs; our Pikalytics ingest normalizes to the same form so aliases work end-to-end. Could add display-name override column in a future UX pass but not a correctness issue.

deferred_validations.name: per_pokemon_movepool_vs_serebii
deferred_validations.why_deferred: Requires per-Pokemon detail scrape from Serebii (~200 pages at 0.5s delay each = ~2 min). validate_champions_sources.py supports a --movepool-sample flag but was blocked by local DNS SERVFAIL on the Supabase host. Sample check via validate_champions_sources.py remains available to run from a networked environment.

deferred_validations.name: per_move_power_accuracy_vs_serebii
deferred_validations.why_deferred: Moves table has 494 Champions-available rows. Cross-checking each against Serebii's moves.shtml would require the same detail-page scrape. Basic sanity (0 null types, 0 null categories, 0 power > 250) passes.
